videos.title: Throwing Down with our MagicCon Chicago Decks! - WPCS 147
videos.description:
The crew gear up for MagicCon Chicago and practice their Commander decks for a fun, memorable weekend with friends. Did you see the crew there? Catch a game with any of them? Let us know in the comments below!

Decklists:
Shea: https://moxfield.com/decks/xrcdjQ-uwECvkpvBWy6XUA
Ben: https://moxfield.com/decks/xcecFw885UiNvyahATDHbw
Blake: https://moxfield.com/decks/8P8Qydw01kKalp8FCkDrzw
CGB: https://moxfield.com/decks/HQr28m4HkUasV7CuFWcoVQ

Sponsors

CoolStuffInc.com Promo Code CGB5 - https://www.coolstuffinc.com/cgb
Dragon Shield Coupon Code CGB5 - https://dragonshield.com/?ref=CGB
DripShop.live - https://join.dripshop.live/CovertGoBlue
Moxfield - https://www.moxfield.com/users/CovertGoBlue

Discord - https://discord.gg/MXt3DEP
Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/covertgoblue/

Credits

Written and performed by Daniel Wagner, aka CovertGoBlue
Logo design by HolyMTG - HolyMTG@gmail.com Twitter @HolyMTG
